title: 26 Meta employees sue over AI-driven layoffs
description: A group of 26 Meta employees has sued the company, claiming it used artificial intelligence systems to select people for layoffs, disproportionately targeting those on medical, parental or family leave.

title: Karnataka To Establish India's First Govt-Driven Artificial Intelligence University: CM DK Shivakumar
description: Karnataka's Chief Minister DK Shivakumar has announced plans to establish India's first government-led Artificial Intelligence University and an AI Hub for research and development., Bengaluru News, Times Now
